title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, etc. locally via a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, list, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, mirrors the Python SDK surface.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-like web UI for any Ollama model, packaged as a lightweight Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing type-safe wrappers for chat, generate, pull, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that adds readline history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that replaces GitHub Copilot with any Ollama model for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, exposing Ollama models as generators and embedders for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes: PDF chatbot, voice assistant, function calling, Next.js apps, etc.

title: ollama-gpt-script
summary: GPTScript tools provider that lets you call Ollama models as if they were OpenAI functions.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library offering async HTTP and WebSocket support for chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes it to CI pipelines for testing.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel service provider wrapping the REST API with facades, queues, and Artisan commands.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into guild channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed and systemd service.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment config to horizontally scale Ollama inference workers across a Ray cluster.
